programme.desc: Taijing confesses that the child Liandou is carrying is not his, but he is willing to care for both Liandou and the child. Enraged, Chairman Kong demands that Taijing and Liandou end their relationship immediately.

programme.title: The Real Has Come! - EP 46
programme.desc: Xianyu confronts Zhiming about the loss of their child in the past. After learning the truth, he realises he cannot forgive her lack of trust and decides to divorce her.

programme.title: Reaching the Unreached - EP 1
programme.desc: Despite death threats and tensions, Farooq and his family are committed to vaccinate children against polio in rural Balochistan. They go door-to-door in the most remote regions to give anti-polio drops to children and to provide healthcare to households.

programme.title: Feud - EP 28
programme.desc: Li Qingyue agrees to take in Bai Jiusi but she suspects that he is acting dumb to resolve their past grudges.

programme.title: News Tonight
programme.desc: Daily evening updates on top local news and world news.

programme.title: Until Tomorrow
programme.desc: A single mother's courage is tested when she resorts to desperate measures to hide her illegitimate child from her parents.

programme.title: Black Snow
programme.desc: Gosha is a trucker in northern Yakutia, who supplies his community with food, alongside low quality vodka which contributes to their alcoholism. When his truck breaks down during one of his trips, he finds himself alone in the wilderness.

programme.title: The Audition
programme.desc: Violin teacher Anna Bronsky detects remarkable talent in a student, Alexander. Anna becomes obsessed with mentoring him, neglecting her family and spiralling under mounting pressure. As her fixation overtakes her, all is staked on exam day.

programme.title: Romancing The Jungle
programme.desc: Eva is a rookie journalist keen on investigating sea piracy. When she is really kidnapped by pirates in Thailand, she is forced to fight for her life. With her is a hunky smuggler called Nik, and together, the comedic duo band together to survive.

programme.title: Celeste
programme.desc: Living in the lush rainforest of Northern Queensland, a retired opera diva prepares for one final performance. Her late husband's son Jack arrives, haunted by the past, only to discover that Celeste has one last request for him.

programme.title: Hard Luck
programme.desc: A family comes to the funeral of their beloved grandfather. After the burial it turns out that the numbers grandfather always bet at the lottery just won big, but the winning ticket was buried with him. The race for the buried ticket begins.

programme.title: Sarah Kohr: Ghosts Of The Past
programme.desc: Ex-gang leader Degen escapes prison after 19 years, putting inspector Sarah Kohr and prosecutor Anton Mehringer in danger. Unable to count on the authorities without risking their secrets, they must confront their pasts when Degen kidnaps Anton's son.

programme.title: Empty Nets
programme.desc: Amir loves Narges and Narges loves Amir. But their hopes and dreams for a life together collide head on with the web of tradition, corruption, and social hierarchy that continues to rule over the lives of a new generation in Iran.

programme.title: Until Tomorrow
programme.desc: A single mother's courage is tested when she resorts to desperate measures to hide her illegitimate child from her parents.

programme.title: Winners
programme.desc: 11-year-old Mona, a Syrian refugee in Berlin, struggles to adapt to her new life. When she joins a competitive girls' football team, she faces the challenge of being an outsider. Soon she realizes the value of teamwork for success.

programme.title: Stormskerry Maja
programme.desc: At 17, Maja marries humble fisherman Janne and starts a family on the remote island of Stormskerry, where survival is a constant challenge. Amidst the hardships, Maja awakens to her potential, finding resilience and a love that transcends life and death.

programme.title: Sarah Kohr: Ghost Lights
programme.desc: In a post-pandemic Europe, conspiracy theorist Felix Morgenroth becomes obsessed with exposing the "coronavirus lie." Convinced that physicians Carsten and Lisa Kippmann were behind the conspiracy, Felix seeks retribution through a devastating explosion.

programme.title: Our Children
programme.desc: A doctor brings a boy to Belgium and raises him as his own. When the boy reaches manhood, he gets married and starts his own family, but he still relies on the doctor, his adoptive father. When trouble strikes his family, dependence turns into domination.

programme.title: To My Beloved
programme.desc: Fernando is a good man who takes care of his only child, Daniel. Following the death of his wife Ana, every night Fernando recalls their love as he sorts out his beloved dead spouse’s belongings. One day he finds a VHS tape that will change everything.

programme.title: Hard Luck
programme.desc: A family comes to the funeral of their beloved grandfather. After the burial it turns out that the numbers grandfather always bet at the lottery just won big, but the winning ticket was buried with him. The race for the buried ticket begins.

programme.title: Bille
programme.desc: In late 1930s Latvia, young Bille grows up in poverty, caught between her mother’s contempt and her father’s alcoholism. Escaping into books and her imagination, she dreams of a better world as she embarks on her path to becoming a celebrated writer.

programme.title: To My Beloved

programme.title: Av
programme.desc: While hitchhiking from Sofia to Ruse, Kamen meets Avé, a 17-year-old runaway girl. A compulsive liar, Avé keeps inventing new identities and backstories, which threaten to get Kamen deeper and deeper into trouble.

programme.title: Suso's Tower
programme.desc: When his best friend, Suso, dies, Cundo returns home for the first time in 10 years to say good-bye. He discovers Suso had a dream to build a tower so that he could see life from a different perspective. Cundo resolves to realise his friend’s wish.

programme.title: Heavenly Nomadic
programme.desc: A family of nomads dwelling high in the mountains of Kyrgyzstan doesn't need any of the conveniences of modern civilization in order to be happy. But progress is creeping into their lives regardless, destroying legends and traditions as it comes.

programme.title: Helen Dorn: After The Storm
programme.desc: After a celebration in her rural hometown, Karla Petersen is murdered on her way home. Inspector Helen Dorn takes on the case but clashes with local officer Tom Petersen, Karla's brother, who defies warnings to find his sister's killer.

programme.title: Oddball
programme.desc: An eccentric chicken farmer, with the help of his granddaughter, trains his mischievous dog Oddball to protect a penguin sanctuary from fox attacks in an attempt to reunite his family and save their seaside town.

programme.title: Impermanence
programme.desc: The film tells the stories of different people and how they are intertwined surrounding the gruesome death of a man who got thrown out of a window.

programme.title: The Vanishing Soldier
programme.desc: An 18-year-old Israeli soldier flees the Gaza battlefield and heads back to his girlfriend in Tel Aviv only to discover that the military elite is convinced he was kidnapped in the fog of war.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - La Gourmet Food Steamer
programme.desc: Simplify meal prep with the 2-Tier Stainless Steel Electric Multi Food Steamer. Designed for healthy, fast, and versatile cooking, it allows you to steam veggies, fish, and more simultaneously, preserving nutrients and flavor. Compact and easy to use—perfect for a nutritious lifestyle! 使用双层不锈钢电动多功能蒸锅，轻松做出健康美味的菜肴。专为健康、快捷、灵活的烹饪设计，能同时蒸煮蔬菜、鱼类等食材，最大限度保留营养与原味。

programme.desc: Say goodbye to measuring and mess – simply toss in this laundry pod and let it do the rest! 完美结合洗衣、消毒、柔软、除臭及芳香剂的5合1浓缩洗衣凝珠

programme.title: Lap Lip
programme.desc: When Alias's granddaughters asked why he has never put up lap-lip for Hari Raya - his response is simple their grandmother got electrocuted by lap-lip and that's why he do not want history to repeat itself. But the true history goes way back, Alias and his brother Mokhsin were the ones who brought in the electric lap-lip hype to Jalan Hari Raya after moving in from Malaysia. That became an annual competition. It's all fun and friendly till one year - things took a turn.

programme.title: Bantal Buruk Saloma - EP 3
programme.desc: BANTAL BURUK SALOMA is a social drama about foster parenting that centres around family, life, love and forming relationships that lasts a lifetime. But it comes with serious challenges, especially when Aidilfitri approaches. Aidilfitri is a happy time for most kids. But for kids in orphanage or foster care, it is not easy. Some miss their parents.

programme.title: Bubur Masjid Air Katira S4 - EP 1
programme.desc: The mosque committee members, headed by Taufik, are eager to embark on a special Ramadan program. Rahmat misleads Taufik into thinking he will sponsor the donation distribution but expectations only lead to disappointment. Sakinah is worried about the household expenses, while Noor falls out with Siti over her online ladies wear business. Siti is determined to prove she has flair for business, too.

programme.title: Bubur Masjid Air Katira S4 - EP 2
programme.desc: One beats the bush and another has the hare. Amongst the mosque committee members, a few have something up their sleeves. What is their intention? Syazwan is now helping Sakinah with her flourishing porridge business. However, instead of gaining sustenance, other issues start to surface. Noor is reeling with jealousy over Siti's newly launched business. Meanwhile, the GM receives an anonymous letter. What is the content of the letter and what will the GM do about it?

programme.title: Bubur Masjid Air Katira S4 - EP 3
programme.desc: Taufik organizes another admirable program for the community. Much to his disappointment, the event is unintentionally sabotaged by someone in the committee who has his own personal agenda. Siti's business is picking up and getting the attention she desires. However, her aggressive marketing strategy is at the expense of Jasmine's feelings. Meanwhile, Sakinah is having trouble managing her business with her daily house chores. She finds a shortcut to her problems.

programme.title: Ultraman Omega - EP 2
programme.desc: There are many universes, they may be similar, but they have their own characteristics, as in the case of Omegaverse. A universe that's similar to the original Ultra universe, but has its own ultras. Omega is a Space Garrison rookie who was sent to Earth on a mission to protect it from monsters that appear mysteriously.

programme.desc: Seeking revenge, Farouk falsely claims Qaisara’s baby is his, damaging her reputation, while Azizi is determined to prove the child is his. Tuan Ishak finally realises that Farouk has not truly changed.

programme.title: Remuk - EP 5

programme.title: Rahasia Dan Cinta - EP 23
programme.desc: Dwita, the daughter of a prominent entrepreneur finds herself caught in an arranged marriage with Greg - a match orchestrated by their fathers to merge their companies. As Dwita, Greg and Deby embark on this unexpected journey together, a series of challenges and complications arise, turning Dwita's life upside down.
